fixture_notice: All values in this file are synthetic and exist only to validate the Codex Time Machine evaluation mechanic. They are not real LegalRAG production history or performance results.
evaluation_purpose: Controlled boundary-only demonstration that a four-example focused comparison cannot justify a production retrieval default.

hit_at_5.meaning: Synthetic fraction of labeled queries with a relevant result in the first five retrieved documents.

mrr.meaning: Synthetic mean reciprocal rank of the first relevant retrieved document.

aggregate_results.method: Unweighted arithmetic mean across the five equal-sized synthetic query groups.

synthetic_conclusion: The four-example focused comparison was insufficient to justify a production retrieval default. The controlled synthetic results vary by query group and do not establish a universal production winner; a representative labeled evaluation is required before choosing a default.
limitations: This is synthetic boundary-only fixture evidence, not organic project history and not real LegalRAG performance. It must not guide production deployment or be presented as a production benchmark. Additional approaches require separate evaluation.
